title: Anthropic Isn’t the Best at Powering Customer Service, New Data Show
summary: Anthropic’s models may be unparalleled at coding, but they’re less capable of powering AI voice and chat applications for customer service than other AI providers. That’s a big problem with voice agents, particularly in customer service, where milliseconds matter.
caption: output/2026-07-21/anthropic-isn-t-the-best-at-powering-customer-service-new-data-show.txt
